## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss hiring plans and pipeline for SEO content roles at GrowthX Labs](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Two offers out to Bissera and Pateek, working on getting them onboarded through Remote](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=399.0)
  - [Need to hire 5-6 more SEO content writers/managers by end of September to support projected client growth](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Exploring fractional/consultant roles for experienced growth marketers in addition to full-time hires](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Utilizing outbound sourcing, referrals, and communities like AirOps Slack to find candidates](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Bissera and Pateek

  - [Molly working with Remote rep to get their accounts set up to sign offers](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - Potential need for shared <careers@growthx.com> email to handle onboarding

### Current Pipeline

  - [Over 50 in assessment stage](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Demetrius had 3-4 interviews, advancing 2 candidates](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=641.0)
  - [Narrowing target countries based on quality of candidates](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=669.0)

### Hiring Targets

  - [Currently 8 clients, projecting 16-20 by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Need 2 Jimmy-level roles and 5-6 SEO content writers](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=757.0)
  - [Exploring fractional/consultant roles for experienced growth marketers](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Aim for 5-6 new hires by end of September to allow ramp up time](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)

### Sourcing Strategies

  - [Outbound to target companies](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=680.0)
  - [Referrals like Corva](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Posting projects on AirOps Slack community](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Molly to work with Remote rep on onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Collaborate with Jimmy on JD for senior growth marketing roles](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Follow up with Corva on potential fractional/consultant role](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Marcel to add Molly to AirOps Slack for sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/7_r9bK9JQtZmPw2nKxPEZkAxom8TS3Xr?tab=summary&timestamp=1117.0)
